description: You are an astrophysics student analyzing the Pleiades star cluster using data from '~/Documents/GeoGebra/data/pleiades_raw_data.csv'. Create a Hertzsprung-Russell (HR) Diagram in GeoGebra by calculating the Absolute Magnitude (M) for each star using a Distance Modulus of 5.6 (M = m - 5.6). Plot the stars with B-V Color on the X-axis and negative Absolute Magnitude (-M) on the Y-axis. Draw a polygon enclosing the main band of stars and add a text label "Main Sequence" near the polygon. Save the project as 'pleiades_analysis.ggb' in '~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/'.
